name: cloud-skills
description: Multi-cloud CLI plugins for Claude Code — manage 11 providers (Hetzner, AWS, Azure, GCP, Scaleway, Contabo, DigitalOcean, Linode, Vultr, OVH, Oracle) through their official command-line tools. Each plugin covers compute, networking, storage, security, DNS, Kubernetes, containers, and serverless where the provider offers them, with guided deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook. Install one provider or all of them.

plugins.name: hcloud
plugins.description: Hetzner Cloud (hcloud) — servers, networking, storage, DNS, and security skills with status/deploy/cleanup commands, a safety hook, and 260+ bundled CLI reference pages

plugins.name: aws
plugins.description: AWS (aws CLI) — EC2 compute, VPC networking, EBS/S3 storage, IAM/ACM security, Route 53 DNS, EKS, ECS/App Runner containers, and Lambda, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook

plugins.name: azure
plugins.description: Azure (az CLI) — VM compute, VNet networking, disk/Blob storage, Key Vault/RBAC security, Azure DNS, AKS, Container Apps/Instances, and Functions, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook

plugins.name: gcp
plugins.description: Google Cloud (gcloud) — Compute Engine, VPC networking, disk/Cloud Storage, IAM/SSL security, Cloud DNS, GKE, Cloud Run, and Cloud Functions, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook

plugins.name: scaleway
plugins.description: Scaleway (scw) — Instances, VPC/Load Balancer networking, block/object storage, IAM security, DNS, Kapsule Kubernetes, Serverless Containers, and Functions, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook

plugins.name: contabo
plugins.description: Contabo (cntb) — VPS/VDS compute, private networks + cloud firewall, object storage, and SSH-key/secret security, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook (no managed DNS, Kubernetes, containers, or serverless)

plugins.name: digitalocean
plugins.description: DigitalOcean (doctl) — Droplets, VPC/firewall/load-balancer networking, volumes/Spaces storage, SSH-key/certificate security, DNS, DOKS Kubernetes, App Platform, and Functions, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook

plugins.name: linode
plugins.description: Linode / Akamai (linode-cli) — Linodes, VPC/firewall/NodeBalancer networking, volumes/object storage, SSH-key security, DNS, and LKE Kubernetes, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook (no managed containers or serverless)

plugins.name: vultr
plugins.description: Vultr (vultr-cli) — Instances, VPC/firewall/load-balancer networking, block/object storage, SSH-key security, DNS, VKE Kubernetes, and Container Registry, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook (no serverless/FaaS)

plugins.name: ovh
plugins.description: OVHcloud Public Cloud (OpenStack / openstack) — instances, networking, block/object storage, and keypair/identity security, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook (DNS and Managed Kubernetes are via the OVH API/Terraform, not openstack)

plugins.name: oracle
plugins.description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (oci) — Compute, VCN networking, block/object storage, IAM/certificates security, DNS, OKE Kubernetes, Container Instances/registry, and Functions, plus status/deploy/cleanup commands and a safety hook
